heading: 50-year leasehold interest in trust or restricted lands for housing purposes
label: 4211 50-year leasehold interest in trust or restricted lands for housing purposes

children.heading: Authority to lease
children.label: a Authority to lease
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, any trust or restricted Indian lands, whether tribally or individually owned, may be leased by the Indian owners, subject to the approval of the affected Indian tribe and the Secretary of the Interior, for housing development and residential purposes.

children.heading: Term
children.label: b Term
children.text: Each lease pursuant to subsection (a) shall be for a term not exceeding 50 years.
is conferred by or pursuant to any other provision of law; or
provides for leases for any period exceeding 50 years.

children.heading: Self-implementation
children.label: d Self-implementation
children.text: This section is intended to be self-implementing and shall not require the issuance of any rule, regulation, or order to take effect as provided in section 705.
